message:
fix(tui): tree filter respects label/repo filters, extract rebuild helper

- Change `build_tree_flat_nodes` to use `has_active_filter()` instead
  of only checking `list_filter != All`. Previously, modal label and
  repo filters were ignored by the tree even though the `passes` vec
  was computed correctly via `issue_matches_filter`.

- Extract `rebuild_tree_if_active()` helper and call it from
  `set_label_filter` and `set_repo_filter` in addition to
  `set_list_filter`, so the tree updates when any filter changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
